items.name_en: 【Top Version Factory Leather Top Quality Replica with Full Counter Packaging】
items.name_cn:
【Top Version Factory Leather Top Quality Replica with Full Counter Packaging】
【With Box】Fendi latest trending bag Small Simply FENDI handbag, debuted at the 2024-25 Fall/Winter Fashion Show, inspired by a vintage style from the early 1990s and named for its elegant basic design. Jacquard fabric material, decorated with the iconic brown FF pattern. The front is decorated with a deep brown patent leather iconic FF decoration. Features a deep brown knotted calf leather long zipper puller, with an internal lined compartment and gold metal fittings. The bag comes with an adjustable shoulder strap for shoulder carrying.
【With Box】
Model: 3023#
Size: 22×13×4.5CM
